---
title: "Computer Architecture: A Quantitative Approach"
description: "My notes & review of [Computer Architecture: A Quantitative Approach](https://a.co/d/0aqV9USl) by John L. Hennessy, David A. Patterson, Christos Kozyrakis"
author: "Tyler Hillery"
date: "2026-04-24"
image: "./cover.jpg"
filters:
    - social-share
share:
    permalink: "https://tylerhillery.com/notes/computer-architecture-a-quant-approach"
    description:
    twitter: true
    facebook: false
    reddit: true
    stumble: false
    tumblr: false
    linkedin: true
    email: true
    mastodon: true
categories: [Technical Books, In Progress]
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Notes 

## Chapter 1: Fundamentals of Quantitative Design and Analysis
